summary: Recording marred by static, rendering it essentially unlistenable
review: The sole review flags pervasive static throughout playback, indicating a severely compromised recording. No musical details are provided, and the show itself cannot be evaluated due to the audio issues.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Playback described as all static; likely corrupted or badly captured audio with no usable clarity.
